metadata.title: SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria
metadata.remarks: AICPA Trust Services Criteria for Security, Availability, Processing Integrity, Confidentiality, and Privacy (2017). The Security category (Common Criteria) is mandatory for all SOC 2 engagements.

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The Common Criteria (Security) category addresses the entity's controls over the security of its system. Security controls protect against unauthorized access, both physical and logical.

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values.

controls.title: Commitment to Integrity and Ethical Values

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Sets the Tone at the Top - The board of directors and management, at all levels, demonstrate through their directives, actions, and behavior the importance of integrity and ethical values to support the functioning of the system of internal control.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Establishes Standards of Conduct - The expectations of the board of directors and senior management concerning integrity and ethical values are defined in the entity's standards of conduct and understood at all levels of the entity and by outsourced service providers and business partners.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Evaluates Adherence to Standards of Conduct - Processes are in place to evaluate the performance of individuals and teams against the entity's expected standards of conduct.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Addresses Deviations in a Timely Manner - Deviations from the entity's expected standards of conduct are identified and remedied in a timely and consistent manner.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The board of directors demonstrates independence from management and exercises oversight of the development and performance of internal control.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Management establishes, with board oversight, structures, reporting lines, and appropriate authorities and responsibilities in the pursuit of objectives.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity demonstrates a commitment to attract, develop, and retain competent individuals in alignment with objectives.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity holds individuals accountable for their internal control responsibilities in the pursuit of objectives.

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant, quality information to support the functioning of internal control.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant, quality information to support the functioning of internal control.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity internally communicates information, including objectives and responsibilities for internal control, necessary to support the functioning of internal control.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity communicates with external parties regarding matters affecting the functioning of internal control.

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable the identification and assessment of risks relating to objectives.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable the identification and assessment of risks relating to objectives.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity identifies risks to the achievement of its objectives across the entity and analyzes risks as a basis for determining how the risks should be managed.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity considers the potential for fraud in assessing risks to the achievement of objectives.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity identifies and assesses changes that could significantly impact the system of internal control.

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The entity selects, develops, and performs ongoing and/or separate evaluations to ascertain whether the components of internal control are present and functioning.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity selects, develops, and performs ongoing and/or separate evaluations to ascertain whether the components of internal control are present and functioning.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity evaluates and communicates internal control deficiencies in a timely manner to those parties responsible for taking corrective action, including senior management and the board of directors, as appropriate.

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The entity selects and develops control activities that contribute to the mitigation of risks to the achievement of objectives to acceptable levels.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity selects and develops control activities that contribute to the mitigation of risks to the achievement of objectives to acceptable levels.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity also selects and develops general control activities over technology to support the achievement of objectives.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity deploys control activities through policies that establish what is expected and procedures that put policies into action.

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets to protect them from security events.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets to protect them from security events to meet the entity's objectives.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Identifies and Manages the Inventory of Information Assets

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Restricts Logical Access

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Identifies and Authenticates Users

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Considers Network Segmentation

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Manages Points of Access

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Restricts Access to Information Assets

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Manages Identification and Authentication

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Manages Credentials for Infrastructure and Software

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Uses Encryption to Protect Data

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Protects Encryption Keys

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Prior to issuing system credentials and granting system access, the entity registers and authorizes new internal and external users whose access is administered by the entity.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Controls Access Credentials to Protected Assets

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Removes Access to Protected Assets When Appropriate

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Reviews Appropriateness of Access Credentials

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity authorizes, modifies, or removes access to data, software, functions, and other protected information assets based on roles, responsibilities, or the system design and changes, giving consideration to the concepts of least privilege and segregation of duties.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Creates or Modifies Access to Protected Information Assets

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Removes Access to Protected Information Assets

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Uses Role-Based Access Controls

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Reviews Access Roles and Rules

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity restricts physical access to facilities and protected information assets (for example, data center facilities, backup media storage, and other sensitive locations) to authorized personnel to meet the entity's objectives.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity discontinues logical and physical protections over physical assets only after the ability to read or recover data and software from those assets has been diminished and is no longer required to meet the entity's objectives.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity implements logical access security measures to protect against threats from sources outside its system boundaries.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Restricts Access

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Protects Identification and Authentication Credentials

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Requires Additional Authentication or Credentials

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Implements Boundary Protection Systems

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized internal and external users and processes, and protects it during transmission, movement, or removal to meet the entity's objectives.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Restricts the Ability to Perform Transmission

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Uses Encryption Technologies or Secure Communication Channels

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Protects Removal Media

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Protects Mobile Devices

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon the introduction of unauthorized or malicious software to meet the entity's objectives.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Restricts Application and Software Installation

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Detects Unauthorized Changes to Software and Configuration Parameters

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Uses a Defined Change Control Process

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Uses Antivirus and Anti-Malware Software

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Scans Information Assets from Outside the Entity for Malware and Other Unauthorized Software

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify changes to configurations that result in the introduction of new vulnerabilities, and susceptibilities to newly discovered vulnerabilities.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: To meet its objectives, the entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify (1) changes to configurations that result in the introduction of new vulnerabilities, and (2) susceptibilities to newly discovered vulnerabilities.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Uses Defined Configuration Standards

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Monitors Infrastructure and Software

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Implements Change-Detection Mechanisms

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Detects Unknown or Unauthorized Components

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Conducts Vulnerability Scans

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity monitors system components and the operation of those components for anomalies that are indicative of malicious acts, natural disasters, and errors affecting the entity's ability to meet its objectives; anomalies are analyzed to determine whether they represent security events.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Implements Detection Policies, Procedures, and Tools

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Designs Detection Measures

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Implements Filters to Analyze Anomalies

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Monitors Detection Tools for Effective Operation

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity evaluates security events to determine whether they could or have resulted in a failure of the entity to meet its objectives (security incidents) and, if so, takes actions to prevent or address such failures.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Responds to Security Incidents

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Communicates and Reviews Detected Security Events

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Develops and Implements Procedures to Analyze Security Incidents

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Assesses the Impact of Security Incidents

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity responds to identified security incidents by executing a defined incident response program to understand, contain, remediate, and communicate security incidents, as appropriate.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Assigns Roles and Responsibilities

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Contains Security Incidents

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Mitigates Ongoing Security Incidents

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Ends Threats Posed by Security Incidents

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Restores Operations

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Develops and Implements Communication Protocols

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Obtains Understanding of Nature of Incident and Determines Containment Strategy

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Remediates Identified Vulnerabilities

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Communicates Remediation Activities

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Evaluates the Effectiveness of Incident Response

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity identifies, develops, and implements activities to recover from identified security incidents.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Restores the Affected Environment

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Communicates Information About the Event

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Determines Root Cause of the Event

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Implements Changes to Prevent and Detect Recurrences

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure and software.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure and software.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Manages Changes Throughout the System Life Cycle

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Authorizes Changes

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Designs and Develops Changes

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Documents Changes

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Tracks System Changes

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Configures Software

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Tests System Changes

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Approves System Changes

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Deploys System Changes

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Identifies and Evaluates System Changes

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Identifies Changes in Infrastructure, Data, Software, and Procedures Required to Remediate Incidents

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities for risks arising from potential business disruptions.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities for risks arising from potential business disruptions.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Considers Mitigation of Risks of Business Disruption

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Considers the Use of Insurance to Mitigate Financial Impact Risks

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity assesses and manages risks associated with vendors and business partners.

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Establishes Requirements for Vendor and Business Partner Engagements

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Assesses Vendor and Business Partner Risks

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Assigns Responsibility and Accountability for Managing Vendors

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Establishes Communication Protocols for Vendors and Business Partners

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Establishes Exception Handling Procedures from Vendors and Business Partners

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Assesses Vendor and Business Partner Performance

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Implements Procedures for Addressing Issues Identified During Vendor and Business Partner Assessments

parts.name: point-of-focus
parts.prose: Implements Procedures for Terminating Vendor and Business Partner Relationships

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The Availability category addresses controls over the availability of the system for operation and use as committed or agreed.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity maintains, monitors, and evaluates current processing capacity and use of system components (infrastructure, data, and software) to manage capacity demand and to enable the implementation of additional capacity to help meet its objectives.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, implements, operates, approves, maintains, and monitors environmental protections, software, data backup processes, and recovery infrastructure to meet its objectives.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity tests recovery plan procedures supporting system recovery to meet its objectives.

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The Processing Integrity category addresses controls over the completeness, validity, accuracy, timeliness, and authorization of system processing.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity obtains or generates, uses, and communicates relevant, quality information regarding the objectives related to processing, including definitions of data processed and product and service specifications, to support the use of products and services.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity implements policies and procedures over system inputs, including controls over completeness and accuracy, to result in products, services, and reporting to meet the entity's objectives.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity implements policies and procedures over system processing to result in products, services, and reporting to meet the entity's objectives.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity implements policies and procedures to make available or deliver output completely, accurately, and timely in accordance with specifications to meet the entity's objectives.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity implements policies and procedures to store inputs, items in processing, and outputs completely, accurately, and timely in accordance with system specifications to meet the entity's objectives.

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The Confidentiality category addresses controls over the protection of confidential information as committed or agreed.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity identifies and maintains confidential information to meet the entity's objectives related to confidentiality.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity disposes of confidential information to meet the entity's objectives related to confidentiality.

parts.name: overview
parts.prose: The Privacy category addresses the entity's personal information collection, use, retention, disclosure, and disposal practices. These criteria address proper notice, choice, and consent regarding collection, as well as the entity's compliance with privacy commitments and applicable laws and regulations.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity provides notice to data subjects about its privacy practices to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity communicates choices available regarding the collection, use, retention, disclosure, and disposal of personal information to data subjects.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Personal information is collected consistent with the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: For information requiring explicit consent, the entity communicates the need for such consent, as well as the consequences of a failure to provide consent for the request for personal information, and obtains the consent prior to the collection of the information to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity limits the use of personal information to the purposes identified in the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity retains personal information consistent with the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity securely disposes of personal information to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity grants identified and authenticated data subjects the ability to access their stored personal information for review and, upon request, provides physical or electronic copies of that information to data subjects to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity corrects, amends, or appends personal information based on information provided by data subjects and communicates such information to third parties, as committed or required, to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity discloses personal information to third parties with the explicit consent of data subjects, and such disclosure is consistent with the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity creates and retains a complete, accurate, and timely record of authorized disclosures of personal information to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity creates and retains a complete, accurate, and timely record of detected or reported unauthorized disclosures of personal information to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity obtains privacy commitments from vendors and other third parties who have access to personal information to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity obtains assurances that the privacy commitments of vendors and other third parties who have access to personal information are being met to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity provides notification of breaches and incidents to affected data subjects, regulators, and others to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity provides data subjects with an accounting of the personal information held and disclosure of the data subjects' personal information, upon the data subjects' request, to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity collects and maintains accurate, up-to-date, complete, and relevant personal information to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The entity complies with its privacy commitments, laws, and regulations to meet the entity's privacy objectives.
